subject: URGENT: Wire Transfer Needed Before End of Day
body:
Hi,

I need you to process an urgent wire transfer of $47,500 to a new vendor before close of business today. This is for a confidential acquisition we're finalizing and I need this handled immediately.

Please use these details:

Bank: First National Trust
Routing: 021000089
Account: 483920174
Beneficiary: Meridian Consulting Group LLC

Do NOT discuss this with anyone else on the team — the deal is under NDA and we cannot risk a leak. I'm in meetings all day and can't take calls, so just process it and send me confirmation by email.

This needs to happen TODAY. If we miss the deadline, we lose the deal entirely.

Thanks for handling this quickly.

James Mitchell
Chief Executive Officer
Acme Corporation
